headline: Here’s Why NZS Capital Sees Tyler Technologies (TYL) as Resilient to AI Concerns
summary: NZS Capital, LLC, an investment management company, released its “NZS Growth Equity Strategy” first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The NZS Growth Equity strategy experienced a return of -8.75% (gross) and -8.91% (net) in Q1 2026, underperforming the -3.30% of the Morningstar Global Target Market Exposure Index. This decline […]
